text: please evaluate the code in the current path

the hotkeybinding creates a problem: when the pc reboots, often the keyboard is non-responsive and a second restart is required. for this reason i had a couple things in the hotkey/keybinding flow disabled prior to upgrading my ram sticks because i am on a t480. please determine where this happened and make recommendations on how to address. I would actually prefer that the keybindings get set upon launching the dictation tool and then rleased when it is closed. no actions yet, advice first
is it currently a git repo?
